game_info.title: Sky Ace - Aerial Combat
game_info.concept:
Project Wingman is a flight action game that lets you take the seat of advanced fighter jets and become a true ace. Fight in various missions and gamemodes ranging from intense aerial dogfights to large scale ground assault in an alternate scorched earth setting. Project Wingman is a combat flight action game with an emphasis on polished and refined gameplay, true-to-its-roots inspirations, and an engaging single player experience. Perfect for those who aren't looking for a simulator experience, with the ease of pick up and play, all the way to those who want a fast-paced challenging flight action game.

Dogfight, strike, and fly through combat zones based off an alternate history of Earth. Either over the cold waters of the Bering Strait, attacking tanks in the brutal environments of Yellowstone magma fields, or diving through the Redwoods to strike targets of opportunity in the Pacific Northwest, across the oceans, above the scarred lands of the world, this war will take you from exotic battlefield to exotic battlefield, all while going up against odds way above your pay grade.

Pure Combat Flight Action
Exotic weaponries such as railguns and geothermal-powered armaments will be ready to pluck you out of the sky if you're careless. Whether you are an attack aircraft pilot, skimming the ground with a gatling gun and rocket launchers attached to your wing, or an interceptor with long range, almost sniper-like missiles at your disposal, it will be up to you to prove yourself as an Ace pilot.


Conquest Mode
In Conquest Mode, fight in an uphill battle against various bosses and ace squadrons in a territory capture game, drawing elements from roguelikes and RPGs. Players will have to earn enough money to not only purchase new aircraft, but build a mercenary army of their own in order to take on waves of increasingly difficult opposition as they struggle to take on a myriad of changing missions.

Virtual Reality
Virtual Reality headsets will work in-game to put the player in the cockpit of aerial warfare, immersing themselves in head-swiveling combat. Combine this with full compatibility with HOTAS peripherals and custom axis curves, and you will be able to experience the game however you want, using any DirectInput supported peripheral you like.

Key Features:

  • Fly in varied and exciting scenarios and locations unlike you've ever seen before
  • Engaging single player campaign
  • Over 20 different aircraft and over 40 unique weapons at your disposal
  • Fight different kinds of adversaries such as giant mechanized fortresses and railgun cannons
  • Test your skills in Conquest mode and fight against hordes of adversaries
  • Want a different Conquest experience? - Adjust it with modifiers to your liking
  • Beautiful 3D Volumetric clouds rendered with TrueSKY
  • Fully rebindable controls and HOTAS compatibility with DirectInput support
  • VR Support
game_info.description: Sky Ace is an intense aerial combat game where you pilot an advanced fighter jet through dangerous skies. Your mission: destroy enemy aircraft, evade incoming missiles, and eliminate ground targets while surviving waves of increasingly difficult opponents. Collect power-ups to enhance your weapons and shields. Complete objectives to progress through missions and prove yourself as the ultimate ace pilot. The fate of the skies rests in your hands!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Maneuver aircraft (Up/Down/Left/Right)
Space: Fire primary weapons (machine gun)
Z: Launch missiles at locked targets
Shift: Activate afterburner for speed boost
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart from game over screen

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic flight controls and maneuverability. This validates that the aircraft responds correctly to directional inputs and maintains proper physics boundaries within the playable area. Testing collision detection with screen edges and basic movement responsiveness.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The AI will execute a pattern of movements including all four directions, testing boundary collisions by attempting to fly off-screen. It will alternate between different movement patterns to ensure smooth transitions and proper velocity handling across all axes.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The aircraft should move smoothly in all directions without stuttering, stay within screen boundaries, and respond immediately to input changes. The test is successful when the aircraft completes a full circuit of movement patterns without errors or getting stuck at edges.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing combat effectiveness and win condition achievement. This validates weapon systems, enemy destruction mechanics, target acquisition, and mission objective completion. The AI will actively engage enemies and ground targets to reach the victory threshold.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The AI will prioritize targeting the nearest enemy aircraft, firing weapons continuously while maintaining optimal engagement distance. It will lock onto targets with missiles when available and alternate between enemy types to maximize score and progress toward mission completion efficiently.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The AI should successfully destroy multiple enemies, accumulate score points, and eventually trigger the win condition by completing mission objectives. Success is measured by achieving GAME_OVER_WIN state within a reasonable timeframe while avoiding excessive damage.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing missile system and target locking mechanics. This validates the lock-on functionality, missile tracking behavior, and projectile collision detection. Ensures missiles properly seek and destroy targets while managing ammunition correctly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The AI will focus on maintaining position relative to enemies to achieve target locks, then fire missiles at optimal times. It will test missile tracking by observing projectile behavior and confirming hits. Multiple missile launches will validate ammunition management and reload mechanics.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Missiles should successfully lock onto targets, track them through the air, and detonate on impact. The test succeeds when multiple missile hits are confirmed and the ammunition system correctly updates the available missile count.

It will test missile tracking by observing projectile behavior and confirming hits. Multiple missile launches will validate ammunition management and reload mechanics.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing defensive systems including evasion and shield mechanics. This validates the player's ability to avoid enemy fire, use afterburner for emergency maneuvers, and survive damage through shield regeneration. Tests the damage and health system integrity.
TEST_4.strategy_description: The AI will deliberately position itself near enemy fire paths, then use evasive maneuvers and afterburner to dodge incoming projectiles. It will test shield depletion by taking controlled damage, then retreat to allow shield regeneration while monitoring health values.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: The aircraft should successfully evade most incoming fire using speed boosts and directional changes. Shields should deplete under fire and regenerate when safe. The test succeeds when the AI survives multiple combat encounters through proper defensive play.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing power-up collection and effect application. This validates spawn mechanics for collectibles, collision detection with power-ups, and proper application of bonuses like weapon upgrades, shield restoration, and score multipliers.
TEST_5.strategy_description: The AI will actively seek out and collect spawned power-ups while continuing combat operations. It will prioritize different power-up types based on current needs (health when damaged, weapons when ammunition is low). The strategy tests whether bonuses apply correctly and stack properly.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Power-ups should spawn at appropriate intervals, remain collectible, and provide immediate visible benefits upon pickup. The test is successful when the AI collects multiple power-up types and demonstrates enhanced capabilities after collection.

TEST_6.test_description: Testing enemy AI behavior and variety. This validates different enemy types, their attack patterns, movement behaviors, and difficulty scaling. Ensures enemies provide appropriate challenge and behave intelligently.
TEST_6.strategy_description: The AI will engage different enemy types and observe their behavior patterns. It will test enemy accuracy, aggression levels, and tactical movements. By surviving multiple waves, the test validates that enemy difficulty increases appropriately over time.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Enemies should display varied behaviors based on type, increase in numbers and difficulty over time, and provide engaging combat challenges. The test succeeds when the AI encounters multiple enemy types with distinct patterns and successfully adapts to increasing difficulty.

TEST_7.test_description: Testing ground target destruction and bombing mechanics. This validates ground-based enemy detection, weapon effectiveness against stationary targets, and scoring for ground strikes. Ensures complete mission objective variety beyond air-to-air combat.
TEST_7.strategy_description: The AI will identify ground targets, position for attack runs, and engage them with appropriate weapons. It will test different approach angles and weapon types to determine optimal strike patterns. The strategy validates both detection ranges and damage application to ground units.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Ground targets should be clearly visible, take damage from player weapons, and award points upon destruction. The test is successful when the AI destroys multiple ground targets using varied attack approaches and contributes meaningfully to overall mission progress.
TEST_7.description: Testing ground target destruction and bombing mechanics. This validates ground-based enemy detection, weapon effectiveness against stationary targets, and scoring for ground strikes. Ensures complete mission objective variety beyond air-to-air combat.
TEST_7.strategy: The AI will identify ground targets, position for attack runs, and engage them with appropriate weapons. It will test different approach angles and weapon types to determine optimal strike patterns. The strategy validates both detection ranges and damage application to ground units.
